source_issue.title: [DOCS] How to use local custom fonts

summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue addresses the lack of documentation on using local custom fonts within the Plone Volto project. Contributors have expressed difficulty in finding clear guidance on how to replace site fonts with custom ones they store locally.

## What needs to be done
Improved documentation needs to be created that outlines how to correctly set up local fonts in Volto, including configuration examples. This should address the specific issues around font pathing and usage, particularly when importing custom fonts versus Google Fonts.

## Helpful background
While some discussions provided insights into possible solutions, the official documentation is outdated and primarily focuses on incorporating Google Fonts. Current examples suggest using the `@fontsFolder` variable and `@font-face` rules, but clarity and detailed instructions are still needed.

## Good first steps
1. Explore existing comments and examples provided by contributors, especially around setting font paths and configurations.
2. Review the current [Volto theming documentation](https://6.docs.plone.org/volto/theming/custom-styling.html) for context.
3. Draft a clear section for the documentation detailing the setup of custom fonts based on community findings.
4. Open a pull request with your documentation draft for review and feedback.
```
